title: Compilation Error
author: chevyman142000
body:
Hello! Came across your tweet a while back and wanted to set this up. I have the server up and running without issue. I am, however, running into some issues with trying to use the exisiting hardware I have. I'm not sure if the hardware is the issue, or something else as I'm getting an error when trying to upload to my esp32 device. The hardware I have is a Firebeetle-ESP32 that is connected to a Wavewahre e-Paper IT8951 Driver HAT which is then connected to a 7.5" Waveshare screen. This hardware is not something I built, but something that I found in an electronics recycling bin, so I was hoping to reuse it since it is already mounted in a picture frame with a battery. 

Let me know if you have any ideas on how to resolve this or if you think I would be better off purchasing newer hardware and trying to retrofit it. Thanks in advance!

Here is what I see in the log in Arduino IDE when trying to upload:

```In file included from C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino:44:
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\partial-refresh.h:23:13: error: variable or field 'updatePartial' declared void
   23 | inline void updatePartial(EPaper* epd) {
      |             ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\partial-refresh.h:23:27: error: 'EPaper' was not declared in this scope
   23 | inline void updatePartial(EPaper* epd) {
      |                           ^~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\partial-refresh.h:23:35: error: 'epd' was not declared in this scope
   23 | inline void updatePartial(EPaper* epd) {
      |                                   ^~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino:112:1: error: 'EPaper' does not name a type

      | ^~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino: In function 'void initializeHardware()':
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino:215:5: error: 'epaper' was not declared in this scope

      |     ^~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino:219:5: error: 'epaper' was not declared in this scope
  219 |     epaper.wake();
      |     ^~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino: In function 'void prepareFirstBoot()':
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino:229:5: error: 'epaper' was not declared in this scope

      |     ^~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino: In function 'void enterDeepSleep(long unsigned int)':
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino:286:3: error: 'epaper' was not declared in this scope
  286 |   epaper.sleep();
      |   ^~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino: In function 'void enterLightSleep()':

      |   ^~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino:418:5: error: 'updatePartial' was not declared in this scope

      |     ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
C:\Users\Jeff\Downloads\dashboard\epaper-client\epaper-client.ino: In function 'int pngDrawCallback(PNGDRAW*)':

Compilation error: variable or field 'updatePartial' declared void
